Grad Cafe Analytics Module 4
============================

This documentation describes the Module 4 Grad Cafe Analytics application.
The project refactors the Module 3 Flask and PostgreSQL application into a
testable structure with Pytest coverage, deterministic test doubles, GitHub
Actions CI, and Sphinx documentation.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:

   setup
   architecture
   testing
   operational_notes
   api
